title: Minor Integrations and Additions (MIA)
description: Several new, usually small integrations, improvements, and additions for several mods and Minecraft itself
body:
This is a Forge mod only, and there are no plans to port it to any other mod loader.

Right now MIA is a 1.12 mod. It won't be ported to previous Minecraft versions.

Due to issues with developing this mod for 1.12, it (most likely) won't receive any further updates. As for ports to future versions of Minecraft - I've realized this project became a nightmare to maintain and ended up bloating with features that should have been their own mods. If it'll receive updates to future Minecraft versions then it most likely will be split into smaller mods, each likely focusing on 1 mod and integrating it further with other mods.

There are some mods that were designed to work with any configuration you use, like Quark and (hopefully) Tinker's Construct.

  

MIA is a mod primarily focusing on adding new integrations and improvements between mods, as well as adding some new features. Some of them include: a few new blocks and an item, new recipes (mostly for crafting stations and machines using items and blocks form other mods), new JEI categories, adding entries to JER, displaying more data for The One Probe, CraftTweaker support (Harvestcraft only so far), as well as several other integrations, improvements, and fixes.

 

New features include:

*   New decorative blocks - originally from my old mod called EVTP, you'll be able to use them to make your homes a little more unique
*   Music player - bring your favorite music discs with you and play them anywhere! It should work with any modded music discs.
*   Pixie dust collector (Ice and Fire) - are you too lazy to collect all that sweet, sweet pixie dust yourself? Well, you can now fully automate that process by putting them into a sweet, cozy apartments (disguised as a machine).
*   Egg sorter (Hatchery, Chickens) - is your mass storage system now full of all the different egg types, each type occupying several slots because they each have different stats, and even the ones with same stats don't stack? Not anymore! With this handy machine you can now store and sort all of your eggs, keeping only the ones with best stats, and discarding the rest of them. Only 1 egg type per a single sorter.
*   Void creator (Thaumcraft) - are you a wuss? Don't worry, me too. That's why this handy machine was made. It's designed to only work with wuss mode enabled, and it's going to create material needed for you to obtain knowledge some would rather not think about.

 

Full list of supported mods (in alphabetical order):

*   Aether, Aether Continuation, Aether: Lost Content
*   Biomes O' Plenty
*   Botania
*   Charm
*   CoFH Core
*   CraftTweaker
*   Dungeon Tactics
*   ExtraBotany
*   Extra Utilities 2
*   FutureMC
*   Harvestcraft
*   Hatchery
*   Ice and Fire
*   Industrial Foregoing (I'd recommend you use Integration Foregoing as well)
*   Just Enough Items (JEI)
*   Just Enough Resources (JER)
*   Mo'Creatures
*   Natura
*   Quark
*   Thaumcraft
*   Thermal Expansion
*   Thermal Foundation
*   Tinker's Construct
*   Most likely some mods that only got minor integrations that I've missed

 

Do you like my work?
